title: Google Drive 403 error on Updates

posts.author: jwlbrace (James Brace)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have an issue with Google Drive, I keep getting a 403 error when attempting to add a Google Drive to Updates on a specific board.

I’ve added the integration to Google Drive on the board - or I think I have, it says it’s done, but I’m assuming this is a permissioning problem with Google Drive itself. Does anyone have a crib sheet on what settings I need to set Drive to to enable Monday integration?

Thanks

James

posts.author: jwlbrace (James Brace)
posts.cookedHtml:
solved it, but for any other useless admins arriving here through search, this is the setting that needs authorisation on Google Drive admin console

Screenshot 2022-11-29 at 12.02.451173×679 72.9 KB

posts.author: RachelGomez161999 (Rachel namia Gomez)
posts.cookedHtml:
code": 403, “message”: “The user does not have sufficient permissions for file {fileId}.” To fix this error, instruct the user to contact the file’s owner and request edit access. You can also check user access levels in the metadata retrieved by files.

Regards,
Rachel Gomez
